title: Ancient God
content:
The 
Ancient Gods
 are a race of gigantic beings from the first branch of the 
Ancient Clan
 who specialize in the cultivation of the body. Their branch rules over the Dao Country in the Immortal Astral Continent and it is the strongest branch of the Ancient Nation in terms of individuals, but weakest as a whole. Its emperor was Ye Dao until Wang Lin killed him and passed the title onto his friend Luo Chen.

The Ancient Gods from Ye Mo's bloodline in the cave world are inferior to the one's from the Immortal Astral Continent. This is because the Ancient Gods from the cave world derive their power from Ye Mo while the rest are directly connected to the Ancient Ancestor. Therefore, a royal Ancient God in the cave world such as 
Tuo Sen
, is in fact just a common Ancient God in the Immortal Astral Continent.

Characteristics
[
]

An Ancient god doesn't cultivate spiritual energy like a cultivator but absorbs a lot of spiritual energy to strengthen their body instead, they do not commonly need to use weapons because their body is itself the most powerful weapon they'll ever need. The Ancient God's Ancient Clan Stars are located on the forehead and their skin is heavily cracked when they're in giant form.

These beings need to feed on stars or celestial bodies in order to grow. As infants, they arrive in a meteorite and then settle in the nucleus of the star or planet they come into contact with and from there they begin to absorb the energy from it until it is lifeless. As they mature, they usually leave their home planet to consume other celestial bodies.

The size that an Ancient God can have is directly related to the level of their cultivation.

Cultivation:
 To an Ancient God, the more times their bodies experience reconstruction, the stronger their cultivation and bodies become. Also, with every reconstruction, their souls would also become larger. Among the Ancient Gods, there were no cultivation levels like in the world of cultivators. The Ancient Gods’ cultivation was mainly just their soul and their body.

The body was the weapon and the soul was the hand that controlled the weapon, combining into the almost invincible Ancient God Family.

Trivia
[
]

The Ancient God inheritance is composed of the Inheritance of Power and Inheritance of Knowledge. Only by having the two can one become a True Ancient God Inheritor.

Other novels

Ancient Gods also appear in other novels of Er Gen - 
I Shall Seal the Heavens
 and 
Pursuit of the Truth
.
